headline: A Look At RTX (RTX) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness And Backlog Growth
summary: RTX stock moves and recent performance snapshot RTX Corporation (RTX) has drawn fresh attention after a period of weaker trading, with a 1 day return of a 1.18% decline, a 7 day return close to flat, and a month return of a 10.65% decline. Over the past 3 months, RTX shows a 13.41% decline. The year to date figure reflects a 7.08% decline, setting a contrasting backdrop to its 1 year, 3 year, and 5 year total return records.
